tasks.name: Book the cheapest Saturday afternoon special exhibition ticket under $20 per adult
tasks.description: Use the Tickets section to find special exhibition time slots on the upcoming Saturday afternoon, filter tickets so the maximum price per adult ticket is $20, sort by price, and proceed to checkout with exactly 2 adult tickets for the cheapest available slot.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Tickets" option in the main header navigation.
In the date picker on the Tickets page, select the upcoming Saturday of the current week.
In the exhibition type filter, select only the "Special Exhibition" category.
In the time-of-day filter, choose the "Afternoon (1:00 PM – 5:00 PM)" option.
In the price filter, enter "$20" into the maximum price per adult ticket field.
Open the sort dropdown and select "Price: Low to High".
From the filtered results list, click the "Select" or "Book" button on the first time slot shown (the cheapest option).
On the ticket selection section, set the "Adult" ticket quantity to "2" using the quantity selector.
Click the "Continue to Checkout" button to move to the checkout page with 2 adult tickets for that time slot.

tasks.name: Create a 3-exhibition free family visit plan for the next 7 days
tasks.description: Use the Exhibitions section to find free, family-friendly exhibitions starting within the next 7 days, sort them by start date, and add the first three exhibitions in the list to a visit plan or favorites section.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Exhibitions" link in the main navigation.
On the Exhibitions page, open the date range filter and set the start date to today and the end date to 7 days from today.
In the price filter section, select the option for "Free admission" only.
In the audience or suitability filter, select the "Family-friendly / Children welcome" option.
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Start date: Soonest first".
In the exhibition results list, click the "Add to Visit Plan" (or "Save"/"Favorite") button on the first exhibition card.
Click the "Add to Visit Plan" button on the second exhibition card in the current filtered list.
Click the "Add to Visit Plan" button on the third exhibition card in the current filtered list.
In the site header, click the "My Visit Plan" or "Favorites" icon/link to open the page showing the saved exhibitions.

tasks.name: Register 1 adult and 1 teen for an evening workshop under $60 total
tasks.description: Use the Events & Workshops section to find an evening workshop on May 20 of the current year, filter to workshops costing no more than $30 per ticket, and register for 1 adult and 1 teen ticket using a pay-on-arrival option.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Events & Workshops" option in the main navigation.
On the Events & Workshops page, use the date picker to select "May 20" of the current year.
Use the time-of-day filter to select the "Evening (6:00 PM – 9:00 PM)" option.
In the price filter, set the maximum price per ticket to "$30".
From the filtered list of events, click the title of the first workshop displayed.
On the workshop detail page, click the "Register" button.
In the registration form, set the "Adult tickets" quantity to "1" and the "Teen tickets" quantity to "1".
In the payment or booking options section, select the "Pay at gallery on arrival" option if available.
Click the "Complete Registration" button to finalize the booking for 1 adult and 1 teen.

tasks.name: Add 3 highly rated postcards under $5 each to the cart
tasks.description: Use the Shop section to find postcard items that cost no more than $5 and have at least a 4-star rating, sort them by rating, add the first three distinct postcards to the cart, and set the quantity of each to 1.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Shop" link in the main navigation.
On the Shop page, click the "Postcards & Prints" category.
In the price filter, enter "$5" as the maximum price.
In the rating filter, select the option for "4 stars & up".
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Customer Rating: High to Low".
In the filtered product grid, click the "Add to Cart" button on the first postcard product shown.
Click the "Add to Cart" button on the second distinct postcard product in the grid.
Scroll down if necessary and click the "Add to Cart" button on the third distinct postcard product in the grid.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page.
In the cart, for each of the three postcard line items, click its quantity selector and set the quantity to "1".

tasks.name: Make a one-time $25 donation to the Artwork Conservation Fund
tasks.description: Use the Support/Donate section to select the Artwork Conservation Fund, enter a one-time donation amount of exactly $25, fill in donor details, choose credit card as payment method, and submit the donation form.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Support" or "Donate" link in the main navigation.
On the Support/Donate page, select the "Artwork Conservation Fund" option from the list of donation causes or funds.
In the donation amount input field, type "25" as the donation amount in dollars.
Select the "One-time donation" radio button instead of any recurring options.
In the "Full name" field, type "Jordan Lee".
In the "Email" field, type "jordan.lee@example.com".
In the payment method section, select the "Credit/Debit Card" option.
In the "Card number" field, type "4111111111111111".
In the "Expiry date" field, type "12/28" and in the "CVC" field type "123".
Click the "Submit Donation" or "Complete Donation" button to send the $25 one-time donation.

tasks.name: Purchase the cheapest annual student membership under $60
tasks.description: Use the Membership section to filter for student/youth memberships that cost no more than $60 per year, sort them by price, choose the cheapest one, fill in basic details, and proceed to the payment step.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Membership" link in the main navigation.
On the Membership page, use the membership type filter to select "Student / Youth" memberships.
In the price filter, set the maximum annual price to "$60".
Open the sort dropdown and select "Price: Low to High".
From the filtered membership options, click the "Join" or "Select" button on the first membership plan shown (the cheapest).
On the membership signup form, type "Taylor Kim" into the "Full name" field.
Type "taylor.kim@example.com" into the "Email" field.
In the "Membership start date" picker, select the first day of the next calendar month.
In the delivery options section, select the "Digital membership card (email)" option.
Click the "Continue to Payment" button to move to the payment step for that membership.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the gallery newsletter with specific content preferences
tasks.description: Use the newsletter form (e.g., in the footer) to subscribe with an email address, select the "Monthly highlights" and "New exhibitions & openings" topics, choose HTML email format, and submit the subscription.
steps: From any page, scroll down to the footer where the newsletter signup form is located.
Click inside the newsletter email input field.
Type "visitor.news@example.com" into the email field.
Click the checkbox labeled "Monthly highlights" to select that topic.
Click the checkbox labeled "New exhibitions & openings" to select that topic.
Open the "Preferred format" dropdown and select the "HTML email" option.
Click the checkbox or option labeled "Contemporary art" under interests or categories.
Click the checkbox or option labeled "Family activities" under interests or categories.
Click the "Subscribe" or "Sign Up" button to submit the newsletter preferences.

tasks.name: Book a weekday morning wheelchair-accessible guided tour for 5 visitors
tasks.description: Use the Visit/Guided Tours section to find weekday morning tours between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM, filter for wheelchair-accessible tours, select the first matching tour, and proceed to checkout with a booking for 5 visitors in English.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Visit" link in the main navigation.
On the Visit page, click the "Guided Tours" section or tab.
In the day-of-week filter, select the "Weekdays (Mon–Fri)" option.
In the time-of-day filter, choose the "Morning (10:00 AM – 12:00 PM)" option.
In the accessibility options, check the box for "Wheelchair accessible route".
From the filtered list of tours, click the title of the first tour shown.
On the tour detail page, click the "Book Tour" button.
In the booking form, set the "Number of visitors" field to "5".
In the "Language" dropdown, select "English".
Click the "Proceed to Checkout" or "Continue" button to move to the next step with the 5-person tour booking.
